overview: Clash Arena is a full-featured eSports tournament platform for mobile games like Free Fire and BGMI. Players can browse daily tournaments, join contests with entry fees, view room codes, track results on live leaderboards, and earn prizes through an internal wallet system. Admins manage tournaments, post room codes, and submit match results.
features: User registration and login via Internet Identity
Tournament listings with card grid layout (game, team mode, entry fee, prize pool)
Solo, Duo, and Squad team modes
Contest types: Top Position, Most Kills, Damage-based
Daily contests with FPP/TPP game modes
Internal wallet system with transaction history
User profile with match history and earnings
Admin panel for tournament creation and management
Gaming-themed dark UI with neon orange/yellow accents
